CREATE TABLE sales (id UInt32, salesperson String, region String, total_sales Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT region, SUM(total_sales) AS total FROM sales GROUP BY region HAVING total > 10000;
SELECT salesperson, region, SUM(total_sales) AS total FROM sales GROUP BY salesperson, region HAVING total > 10000 ORDER BY total DESC;
SELECT region, COUNT(*) AS count FROM sales GROUP BY region HAVING count > 1;
SELECT region, AVG(total_sales) AS average_sales FROM sales GROUP BY region HAVING average_sales < 11000;
SELECT salesperson, SUM(total_sales) AS total FROM sales GROUP BY salesperson HAVING total BETWEEN 8000 AND 15000;
SELECT region, SUM(total_sales) AS total FROM sales WHERE region != 'West' GROUP BY region HAVING total > 9000;
SELECT region, SUM(total_sales) AS total FROM sales GROUP BY region HAVING total = (SELECT MAX(total) FROM (SELECT SUM(total_sales) AS total FROM sales GROUP BY region));
SELECT salesperson, SUM(total_sales) AS total FROM sales GROUP BY salesperson HAVING total > 10000 AND COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT region FROM (SELECT region, SUM(total_sales) AS total FROM sales GROUP BY region) HAVING total < 20000 ORDER BY total DESC;
SELECT region, SUM(total_sales) AS total FROM sales WHERE total_sales IS NOT NULL GROUP BY region HAVING total > (SELECT AVG(total_sales) FROM sales);
SELECT region, COUNT(DISTINCT salesperson) AS salesperson_count FROM sales GROUP BY region HAVING salesperson_count < 3;
